message:
feat: expand facade API surface with storage, durability, and federated re-exports

Flatten the public API surface of the frankensearch facade crate by
re-exporting newly added types from storage, durability, and fusion
crates, making them accessible via a single import path.

frankensearch/src/lib.rs:
- Add flat re-exports for storage types: Storage, BatchResult,
  DocumentRecord, JobQueueConfig, IngestAction, IngestResult,
  StorageBackedJobRunner
- Add FTS5 re-exports (feature-gated): Fts5Config, Fts5ContentMode,
  Fts5Tokenizer
- Add durability re-exports: DurabilityConfig, FileProtector,
  FsviProtector, RepairCodec
- Add fusion re-exports: FederatedConfig, FederatedSearcher,
  FederatedFusion, FederatedHit
- Expand prelude module with feature-gated storage/durability exports
- Enhance re-export tests to validate all new types are accessible

frankensearch/Cargo.toml:
- Fix fts5 feature to properly gate frankensearch-storage/fts5

frankensearch/benches/search_bench.rs:
- Minor formatting adjustment

Cargo.toml (workspace root):
- Add tools/optimize_params to workspace members

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ fastembed = ["frankensearch-embed/fastembed"]
 lexical = ["dep:frankensearch-lexical", "frankensearch-fusion/lexical"]
 storage = ["dep:frankensearch-storage"]
 durability = ["dep:frankensearch-durability"]
-fts5 = ["storage"]
+fts5 = ["storage", "frankensearch-storage/fts5"]
 rerank = ["dep:frankensearch-rerank"]
 ann = ["frankensearch-index/ann"]
 download = ["frankensearch-embed/download"]
